subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-02
subcodes.first_line: Man is first like a pupil. He becomes learned. Then he becomes a teacher. First he is a patient... The life of man will at last end in this world. We must all take out of this life some fruit.
subcodes.subjects: @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @spiritual transformation
